creator: freebsd@troback.com
text:
Maintainer update of net-mgmt/nagios-check_bacula

Fix: PORTNAME=      check_bacula
-PORTVERSION=   2.4.1
+PORTVERSION=   2.4.4
 CATEGORIES=    net-mgmt
 MASTER_SITES=  ${MASTER_SITE_SOURCEFORGE}
 PKGNAMEPREFIX= nagios-


-- 
This message has been scanned for viruses and
dangerous content by MailScanner, and is
believed to be clean.--6g6z6xhmFZuKGugyhPanmMY95oZC6xYwOnF2rFz3jUnH06bc

Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit

diff -ruN nagios-check_bacula.org/Makefile nagios-check_bacula/Makefile
--- nagios-check_bacula.org/Makefile    2009-03-17 15:27:12.000000000 +0100
+++ nagios-check_bacula/Makefile        2009-03-17 15:28:30.000000000 +0100
